    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model with parameters of type OfferTile
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Totem.moveToOffer(OfferTile offerTile)
    Moves this totem onto an offer tile, detaching it from its current location first.
    void
    Game.placeTotemOnOffer(Player player, OfferTile tile)
    Places a player's totem on an offer tile by delegating to the current state.
    default void
    GameState.placeTotemOnOffer(Game game, Player player, OfferTile tile)
    Places the given player's totem on an offer tile.

  • Uses of OfferTile in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.states

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.states with parameters of type OfferTile
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    TotemPlacementState.placeTotemOnOffer(Game game, Player player, OfferTile tile)
    Places the player's totem on the chosen tile, then either passes the turn to the next player or, if everyone has placed, starts the action phase.
